title: dynamic-ntm-session-coverage-heartbeat
original_acceptance: Replace static session list in ntm-watcher-heartbeat.sh with dynamic ntm list --json discovery.
Use config/topology session paths where available.
Surface daemon freshness through flywheel status/health surfaces.

evidence.proof: The current fleet-health wrapper uses ntm list --json for session discovery, calls ntm health <session> --json for each discovered session, and carries topology_observer state in each ledger row.
Canonical health summarizes recent fleet-health runs from the audit log with total_runs, last_run_ts, last_status, pass_rate, and window.
Regression coverage distinguishes unconfirmed topology row-count decreases from Joshua-confirmed rebuilds and walk-in-progress states.

not_used_as_evidence.reason: A separate scaffold interception gap remains: doctor/validate are intercepted by the canonical scaffold and return TODO even though native implementations exist below it. This receipt does not rely on that surface.

residual_risk: The legacy file name ntm-watcher-heartbeat.sh no longer exists as the active surface. Closure is based on the successor ntm-fleet-health path and its tests, not on resurrecting the old filename.
close_reason: Completed by successor ntm-fleet-health dynamic discovery and topology/freshness evidence; tests passed; AUTONOMY: autonomous
